## Portfolio

---
### Professional Profile

With over 20 years of experience, I specialize in architecting and executing the migration of complex, on-premise data ecosystems to modern cloud platforms (Databricks, Azure, Fabric). My focus is on delivering "zero-failure" transitions for enterprise-scale initiatives that serve up to 22,000 users.

I am typically brought in to lead the technical vision for large-scale capital projects—managing cross-functional teams of 10–15 specialists (Senior Architects, Dev Leads, BAs, and PMs) through 2-to-4-year transformation cycles.

Why Organizations Trust Me with $10M+ Transformation Budgets:

Modern Data Stack Architecture: I design the blueprints for high-concurrency environments that support thousands of internal and external users without performance degradation, minimizing costs.

Legacy-to-Cloud: I understand the "on-premise DNA" (SQL Server, Oracle, Hadoop) and how to successfully translate it into modern, cost-efficient cloud architectures.

Leadership and Teams Growth: I excel at coordinating high-seniority teams (4+ Seniors/leads), ensuring that the technical execution remains aligned with the C-suite’s strategic goals.

Risk & Scale Mitigation: Moving 20 years of data is a liability-heavy task. I implement rigorous governance and validation frameworks that ensure data integrity for up to 22,000 stakeholders.

Engineering-Led Strategy: Because I spent over a decade as a Senior Data Engineer, my architectural designs are grounded in reality. I understand the "plumbing" of data (Python, SQL, ETL/ELT) as deeply as the "high-level vision."

Project Archetype:
- Scale: 2–4 Year Transformation Lifecycles.
- Team: 10–15 FTEs (Architects, Engineers, BA/PM).
- User Base: 200 to 22,000+ active users.
- Tech Stack: Databricks, Fabric, Python, Azure.

Expertise: Solution Architecture | Data Modelling | Cloud Data Warehousing (Databricks/Azure) | Enterprise BI Strategy | ETL/ELT Frameworks | Data Governance | Senior Engineering Leadership
